preflight.note: off-camera: the page loads sidebar-collapsed then JS applies the profile persisted preference (~1-2s later). Settle before the railToggle normalization so the unless-check + press act on the settled state (a blind early click can over-toggle an already-expanded sidebar and fail its sidebarExpanded postcondition).
off-camera: stage the shared persisted sidebar preference expanded (washcentral-sidebar-collapsed-v5) before the take
off-camera: genuine toggle closes the persisted Operations group (washcentral-settings-menu-v1) so step 1 expands it on camera
off-camera: genuine toggle closes the persisted Automation group so the step-8 reveal is genuine
